title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 70.515 - Regional investment district compact with Kansas and Missouri
text:
70.515.  Regional investment district compact with Kansas and Missouri. — Subject to the applicable provisions of section 70.545, the Regional Investment District Compact is hereby enacted into law and entered into by the state of Missouri with the state of Kansas legally joining therein, in the form substantially as follows:
(L. 2006 S.B. 825, A.L. 2007 S.B. 22)
